title: Testcase chi tiet 4 module Danh muc (So van ban, Loai van ban, Linh vuc, Nguoi ky)

testcases.title: Hien thi 3 tab phan loai so van ban
testcases.preconditions: Dang nhap tai khoan quan tri don vi, vao trang Quan ly so van ban
steps: Quan sat khu vuc tieu de the 'Danh sach so van ban'
Quan sat hang tab phia tren bang
testcases.expected_result: Hien thi 3 tab: Van ban den / Van ban di / Van ban du thao. Tab Van ban den la tab mac dinh duoc chon.

testcases.title: Chuyen doi giua cac tab loc theo nhom van ban
testcases.preconditions: Da co so van ban thuoc ca 3 nhom
testcases.expected_result: Bang danh sach lam moi du lieu theo nhom van ban tuong ung moi tab.

testcases.title: Hien thi day du cac cot du lieu
testcases.preconditions: Da co it nhat 1 so van ban
steps: Quan sat header bang danh sach
testcases.expected_result: Bang co cac cot: Ten so (in dam mau xanh dam), Mo ta, Thu tu, Mac dinh (nhan 'Mac dinh' xanh / 'Khong').

testcases.title: Them so van ban moi voi du lieu hop le (tab Van ban den)
testcases.preconditions: Dang o tab 'Van ban den'
steps: Nhap Ten so: 'So van ban den 2026'
Nhap Mo ta: 'So phuc vu nam 2026'
Tat cong tac So mac dinh
testcases.expected_result: Hien thi thong bao 'Them thanh cong'. Drawer dong. Ban ghi moi xuat hien o tab Van ban den voi cot Mac dinh la 'Khong'.

testcases.title: Them so van ban kem dat mac dinh
testcases.preconditions: Tab 'Van ban den' da co 1 so dang la mac dinh (So A)
steps: Nhap Ten so: 'So van ban den B'
Bat cong tac So mac dinh
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Them thanh cong'. So B hien thi nhan 'Mac dinh' (xanh). So A truoc do tu dong chuyen ve 'Khong'.

testcases.title: Bo trong Ten so khi Them moi
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them so van ban dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Hien thi loi 'Nhap ten so van ban' inline duoi truong Ten so. Drawer khong dong.

testcases.title: Ten so vuot qua 200 ky tu
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them so dang mo
steps: Nhap Ten so 201 ky tu (paste chuoi dai)
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Ten so van ban khong duoc vuot qua 200 ky tu'. Khong tao moi.

testcases.title: Ten so 200 ky tu (boundary tren)
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them so dang mo
steps: Nhap Ten so dung 200 ky tu
testcases.expected_result: Tao thanh cong, hien thi 'Them thanh cong'.

testcases.title: Mo ta vuot qua 500 ky tu
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them so dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Form khong cho nhap qua 500 ky tu HOAC tra ve loi do dai mo ta.

testcases.title: Trung Ten so trong cung don vi va cung nhom
testcases.preconditions: Tab Van ban den da co so 'So cong van den'
steps: Nhap Ten so: 'So cong van den' (trung)
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao loi inline 'Ten so van ban da ton tai trong don vi'. Khong tao moi.

testcases.title: Cho phep trung ten so giua cac nhom khac nhau
testcases.preconditions: Tab Van ban den da co so 'So 01'
steps: Chuyen sang tab Van ban di
testcases.expected_result: Tao thanh cong (vi rang buoc unique chi trong cung nhom).

testcases.title: Thu tu am bi tu choi
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them so dang mo
testcases.expected_result: InputNumber chan gia tri am HOAC tra ve loi 'Thu tu phai la so nguyen khong am'.

testcases.title: Sua so van ban hien co
testcases.preconditions: Da co it nhat 1 so van ban
steps: Click bieu tuong 3 cham doc cuoi dong
Sua Mo ta thanh 'Mo ta moi'
testcases.expected_result: Drawer dong. Thong bao 'Cap nhat thanh cong'. Cot Mo ta cap nhat gia tri moi.

testcases.title: Dat mac dinh tu menu 3 cham
testcases.preconditions: Tab Van ban den co So A (mac dinh) va So B (khong mac dinh)
steps: Click 3 cham doc dong So B
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Dat mac dinh thanh cong'. So B chuyen sang nhan 'Mac dinh' xanh. So A tu dong chuyen ve 'Khong'.

testcases.title: Xoa so van ban khong dang duoc tham chieu
testcases.preconditions: Da co so chua duoc su dung trong VB den/di/du thao
steps: Click nut 'Xoa' mau do trong hop xac nhan
testcases.expected_result: Hop thoai dong. Thong bao 'Xoa thanh cong'. Ban ghi bien mat khoi bang.

testcases.title: Huy hop xac nhan xoa
testcases.preconditions: Hop xac nhan xoa dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Hop thoai dong, ban ghi van con trong bang, khong co thong bao.

testcases.title: Xoa so van ban dang duoc tham chieu boi van ban
testcases.preconditions: Co so van ban dang duoc su dung boi >=1 van ban den
steps: Click 3 cham doc dong so do
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Loi khi xoa' (tu rang buoc FK). Ban ghi van con trong bang.

testcases.title: Drawer mo voi tieu de dung khi Them moi
testcases.preconditions: Dang o tab Van ban di
testcases.expected_result: Drawer hien tieu de 'Them so van ban moi'. Co 2 nut Huy va Them moi o phia tren ben phai.

testcases.title: Drawer mo voi tieu de dung khi Sua
testcases.preconditions: Co it nhat 1 so van ban
testcases.expected_result: Drawer hien tieu de 'Cap nhat so van ban'. Co 2 nut Huy va Cap nhat. Cac truong da fill du lieu hien tai.

testcases.title: Huy Drawer khi Them moi khong luu
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them so dang mo, da nhap mot vai truong
testcases.expected_result: Drawer dong. Khong co ban ghi moi trong bang. Khong co thong bao.

testcases.title: Thu tu hien thi theo cot 'Thu tu' tang dan
testcases.preconditions: Tab Van ban den co 3 so voi thu tu 0, 5, 2
steps: Quan sat thu tu hien thi tu tren xuong
testcases.expected_result: Cac so duoc sap xep theo Thu tu tang dan: 0, 2, 5.

testcases.title: Khong the dat mac dinh khi so do dang la mac dinh
testcases.preconditions: So A dang la mac dinh trong tab Van ban den
steps: Click 3 cham doc dong So A
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Dat mac dinh thanh cong' nhung trang thai khong thay doi (idempotent), HOAC menu 'Dat mac dinh' bi disabled / an khi so da la mac dinh.

testcases.title: Hien thi 3 tab phan loai loai van ban
testcases.preconditions: Dang nhap quan tri, vao Quan ly loai van ban
steps: Quan sat the 'Danh sach loai van ban'
testcases.expected_result: Hien 3 tab: Van ban den / Van ban di / Van ban du thao. Tab Van ban den mac dinh.

testcases.title: Chuyen tab loc theo type_id
testcases.preconditions: Co loai van ban thuoc ca 3 nhom
steps: Click tab Van ban du thao
Click lai tab Van ban den
testcases.expected_result: Bang lam moi theo type_id 1/2/3.

testcases.title: Hien thi day du cac cot va kha nang mo rong cay
testcases.preconditions: Co loai van ban co loai con
steps: Click mui ten mo rong dong cha
testcases.expected_result: Co cot Ma (in dam xanh dam), Ten loai VB, Ky hieu, Thu tu. Mui ten mo rong hien thi loai con thut le.

testcases.title: Cot 'Ky hieu' render mapping enum
testcases.preconditions: Co 3 loai voi sign_type lan luot: Khong co, So/Ky hieu, So-Ky hieu
steps: Quan sat cot Ky hieu cua 3 loai
testcases.expected_result: Loai 1: hien dau gach ngang '-'. Loai 2: 'So/Ky hieu'. Loai 3: 'So-Ky hieu'.

testcases.title: Them loai van ban goc voi du lieu hop le
testcases.preconditions: Tab Van ban den dang chon
steps: Chon Kieu ky hieu: So/Ky hieu
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Them thanh cong'. Drawer dong. Ban ghi moi hien o muc goc cua bang voi cot Ky hieu = 'So/Ky hieu'.

testcases.title: Them loai con co Loai cha
testcases.preconditions: Co loai 'NQ' (Nghi quyet)
testcases.expected_result: Tao thanh cong. Loai NQHD hien thi nhu loai con khi mo rong NQ.

testcases.title: Bo trong Ma khi Them moi
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Loi inline 'Nhap ma loai van ban' duoi truong Ma. Khong tao moi.

testcases.title: Bo trong Ten khi Them moi
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Loi inline 'Nhap ten loai van ban' duoi truong Ten.

testcases.title: Ma vuot 20 ky tu
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Ma loai van ban khong duoc vuot qua 20 ky tu' HOAC input chan o 20 ky tu.

testcases.title: Ten vuot 200 ky tu
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Ten loai van ban khong duoc vuot qua 200 ky tu'.

testcases.title: Trung Ma loai van ban
testcases.preconditions: Da co loai voi Ma 'NQ'
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Ma loai van ban da ton tai'. Khong tao moi.

testcases.title: Sua loai - chon chinh minh lam Loai cha
testcases.preconditions: Co loai NQ
steps: Chon Loai cha: 'NQ - Nghi quyet' (chinh minh)
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Khong the chon chinh minh lam cha'. Khong cap nhat.

testcases.title: Sua loai - thay doi Kieu ky hieu
testcases.preconditions: Co loai NQ voi sign_type='Khong co'
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Cap nhat thanh cong'. Cot Ky hieu cua loai NQ chuyen tu '-' sang 'So-Ky hieu'.

testcases.title: Search Loai cha trong dropdown
testcases.preconditions: Co nhieu loai van ban
testcases.expected_result: Dropdown loc va hien thi cac loai co ten chua 'Nghi'.

testcases.title: Xoa loai van ban khong co loai con va khong tham chieu
testcases.preconditions: Co loai van ban roi
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Xoa thanh cong'. Ban ghi bien mat.

testcases.title: Xoa loai dang co loai con
testcases.preconditions: Loai NQ co loai con NQHD
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Loi khi xoa' (FK). Khong xoa duoc.

testcases.title: Xoa loai dang duoc tham chieu boi van ban
testcases.preconditions: Loai NQ duoc gan cho >=1 van ban
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Loi khi xoa'. Ban ghi van con.

testcases.title: Boundary - Ma 20 ky tu
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them mo
testcases.expected_result: Tao thanh cong.

testcases.title: Drawer tieu de dung khi Sua
testcases.preconditions: Co loai van ban
testcases.expected_result: Drawer hien 'Cap nhat loai van ban'. Cac truong da fill gia tri hien tai.

testcases.title: Huy Drawer Sua khong luu thay doi
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Sua dang mo, da sua mot truong
testcases.expected_result: Drawer dong. Du lieu trong bang khong thay doi.

testcases.title: Hien thi danh sach linh vuc cua don vi
testcases.preconditions: Dang nhap quan tri, vao Quan ly linh vuc
steps: Quan sat the 'Danh sach linh vuc'
testcases.expected_result: Bang hien cot Ma, Ten linh vuc, Thu tu, Trang thai. Co o tim kiem va nut 'Them linh vuc' o goc phai tieu de the.

testcases.title: Trang thai 'Hoat dong' va 'Ngung' hien thi mau khac nhau
testcases.preconditions: Co linh vuc Hoat dong va linh vuc Ngung
testcases.expected_result: Linh vuc Hoat dong: nhan xanh. Linh vuc Ngung: nhan do.

testcases.title: Tim kiem theo tu khoa khi nhan Enter
testcases.preconditions: Co linh vuc 'Khoa hoc cong nghe' va 'Tai chinh'
testcases.expected_result: Bang chi hien linh vuc co ten hoac ma chua 'Khoa' (Khoa hoc cong nghe).

testcases.title: Click bieu tuong kinh lup khong trigger search
testcases.preconditions: O tim kiem co tu khoa 'KHCN'
testcases.expected_result: Bang khong loc (kinh lup chi trang tri). Theo HDSD: 'ap dung khi nhan Enter'.

testcases.title: Them linh vuc moi voi du lieu hop le
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them linh vuc dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Them thanh cong'. Drawer dong. Ban ghi moi co Trang thai mac dinh 'Hoat dong'.

testcases.title: Khi Them moi khong co truong Trang thai
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them linh vuc dang mo
steps: Quan sat cac truong trong Drawer
testcases.expected_result: Drawer chi co Ma, Ten, Thu tu. KHONG hien truong Trang thai (theo HDSD: chi hien khi sua).

testcases.title: Bo trong Ma khi Them
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Loi inline 'Nhap ma linh vuc'.

testcases.title: Bo trong Ten khi Them
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Loi inline 'Nhap ten linh vuc'.

testcases.title: Ma vuot 20 ky tu
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Ma linh vuc khong duoc vuot qua 20 ky tu'.

testcases.title: Ten vuot 200 ky tu
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Ten linh vuc khong duoc vuot qua 200 ky tu'.

testcases.title: Trung Ma trong cung don vi
testcases.preconditions: Da co linh vuc voi Ma 'KHCN'
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Ma linh vuc da ton tai trong don vi'. Khong tao moi.

testcases.title: Sua linh vuc - bat/tat trang thai
testcases.preconditions: Co linh vuc 'KHCN' Hoat dong
steps: Quan sat truong Trang thai (cong tac)
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Cap nhat thanh cong'. Cot Trang thai chuyen tu xanh 'Hoat dong' sang do 'Ngung'.

testcases.title: Linh vuc Ngung khong xuat hien o form chon van ban
testcases.preconditions: Linh vuc 'KHCN' o trang thai Ngung
steps: Mo form Tao van ban den moi
testcases.expected_result: Linh vuc 'KHCN' KHONG xuat hien trong dropdown. Cac linh vuc Hoat dong khac van xuat hien.

testcases.title: Xoa linh vuc khong tham chieu
testcases.preconditions: Co linh vuc chua duoc gan vao van ban nao
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Xoa thanh cong'. Ban ghi bien mat.

testcases.title: Xoa linh vuc dang duoc tham chieu
testcases.preconditions: Linh vuc 'KHCN' duoc gan cho >=1 van ban
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Loi khi xoa'. Ban ghi van con.

testcases.title: Hien thi 2 cot: cay phong ban + bang nguoi ky
testcases.preconditions: Dang nhap quan tri, vao Quan ly nguoi ky
testcases.expected_result: Cot trai: the 'Phong ban' co o tim kiem va nut tai lai, hien thi cay phong ban don vi. Cot phai: the 'Danh sach nguoi ky' va nut 'Them nguoi ky' o goc phai.

testcases.title: Khi chua chon phong ban tren cay - hien toan bo nguoi ky cua don vi
testcases.preconditions: Don vi co nguoi ky o nhieu phong ban
steps: Vao trang Quan ly nguoi ky (chua click cay)
testcases.expected_result: Bang ben phai hien thi tat ca nguoi ky cua don vi (khong loc).

testcases.title: Loc nguoi ky theo nhanh phong ban da chon
testcases.preconditions: Co nguoi ky tai 'Phong KHCN' va 'Phong Tai chinh'
testcases.expected_result: Bang chi hien thi nguoi ky thuoc Phong KHCN (va cac phong ban con neu co).

testcases.title: Tim kiem phong ban tren cay
testcases.preconditions: Cay co Phong KHCN, Phong TC, Phong NS
steps: Nhap 'KHCN' vao o tim kiem phong ban
testcases.expected_result: Cay loc va highlight nhanh chua 'KHCN'. Cac nhanh khac an di hoac mo.

testcases.title: Tai lai cay phong ban
testcases.preconditions: Dang xem cay phong ban
steps: Click bieu tuong tai lai goc phai tieu de the Phong ban
testcases.expected_result: Cay reload, hien lai du lieu phong ban moi nhat.

testcases.title: Hien thi day du cac cot trong bang nguoi ky
testcases.preconditions: Co >=1 nguoi ky
testcases.expected_result: Co cot Ho ten (in dam mau xanh dam), Chuc vu, Phong ban, Thao tac (bieu tuong thung rac).

testcases.title: Bang KHONG co nut Sua
testcases.preconditions: Co >=1 nguoi ky
steps: Quan sat cot Thao tac cua moi dong
testcases.expected_result: Cot Thao tac CHI co bieu tuong thung rac (xoa). KHONG co bieu tuong/menu Sua.

testcases.title: Bao loi khi click 'Them nguoi ky' chua chon nhanh tren cay
testcases.preconditions: Chua click vao bat ky nhanh nao tren cay phong ban
testcases.expected_result: Hien thi thong bao 'Vui long chon phong ban / don vi tu cay ben trai truoc'. Khong mo Modal.

testcases.title: Mo Modal Them nguoi ky sau khi chon nhanh
testcases.preconditions: Da chon 'Phong KHCN' tren cay
testcases.expected_result: Modal hien thi tieu de 'Them nguoi ky' voi dong huong dan 'Chon nhan vien de them vao danh sach nguoi ky' va o chon nhan vien.

testcases.title: Dropdown chi hien nhan vien thuoc nhanh da chon (gom phong ban con)
testcases.preconditions: Modal Them mo, da chon 'Phong KHCN' (co phong con 'Phong CNTT')
steps: Click vao o chon nhan vien
testcases.expected_result: Dropdown chi hien thi nhan vien thuoc Phong KHCN va Phong CNTT theo dinh dang 'Ho ten - Chuc vu - Phong ban'. Khong hien nhan vien phong ban khac.

testcases.title: Chua chon nhan vien khi nhan Them
testcases.preconditions: Modal Them dang mo, chua chon nhan vien
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Vui long chon nhan vien'. Modal khong dong.

testcases.title: Them nguoi ky thanh cong
testcases.preconditions: Modal Them mo, da chon nhan vien 'Nguyen Van A - Truong phong - Phong KHCN'
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Them nguoi ky thanh cong'. Modal dong. Bang hien thi them dong moi voi Ho ten = 'Nguyen Van A'.

testcases.title: Khong duoc them lai nhan vien da la nguoi ky cua phong ban do
testcases.preconditions: Nguyen Van A da la nguoi ky cua Phong KHCN
testcases.expected_result: Nguyen Van A KHONG xuat hien trong dropdown HOAC khi chon va Click 'Them' se bao loi 'Nhan vien da la nguoi ky cua phong ban'. Khong them duplicate.

testcases.title: Xoa nguoi ky - hop xac nhan hien ten
testcases.preconditions: Co nguoi ky 'Nguyen Van A' trong bang
steps: Click bieu tuong thung rac dong A
testcases.expected_result: Hop xac nhan hien tieu de 'Xac nhan xoa' va noi dung 'Ban co chac chan muon xoa nguoi ky "Nguyen Van A"?'.

testcases.title: Xoa nguoi ky thanh cong
testcases.preconditions: Hop xac nhan xoa Nguyen Van A dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Thong bao 'Xoa nguoi ky thanh cong'. Hop dong. Dong A bien mat khoi bang.

testcases.title: Huy hop xac nhan xoa
testcases.preconditions: Hop xac nhan xoa dang mo
testcases.expected_result: Hop dong. Dong nguoi ky van con. Khong co thong bao.

testcases.title: Trigger DB tu sync khi nhan vien doi phong ban
testcases.preconditions: Nguyen Van A la nguoi ky thuoc Phong KHCN. Quan tri vua chuyen A sang Phong CNTT (cap nhat staff.department_id)
steps: Mo lai trang Quan ly nguoi ky
testcases.expected_result: Nguyen Van A xuat hien trong bang khi loc Phong CNTT (trigger DB tu dong sync). Cot Phong ban hien 'Phong CNTT'. Khong can quan tri thao tac thu cong.

testcases.title: Tim kiem nhan vien trong dropdown Modal Them
testcases.preconditions: Modal Them mo, da chon Phong KHCN co nhieu nhan vien
testcases.expected_result: Dropdown loc, hien thi nhan vien co ho ten/chuc vu/phong ban chua 'Nguyen'.
